Meaning: All after (used after question mark to request a repetition)
Break (to pause transmission of a message, say)
All stations distress (used preceding SOS to let all operators know of an impending distress signal)
Call sign (used to request a call sign)
Distance (sometimes refers to long distance contact), foreign countries
Over to you; only the station named should respond (e.g. W7PTH DE W1AW  KN )
Prefix indicating a message to or from the master of a ship concerning its operation or navigation
I have nothing to send you
Report / Repeat please / I repeat as follows
